M1.name: buyer_proof
M1.description: Core buyer proof generation and gate enforcement
M1.constraint: MUST reach >99% determinism by Month 2 of execution

M2.name: loop_autonomy
M2.description: Autonomous factory tick and fleet state management
M2.constraint: Must sustain ≥8h autonomous runs without manual intervention

M3.name: governance_spine
M3.description: SSOT custody, independent verification, receipt validation
M3.integrator: GitHub App advisor + verifier birth receipts
M3.constraint: All gate decisions must pass independent verification before M1 deployment

M4.name: platform_surface
M4.description: Marketing website, investor relations, trust ledger UX
M4.constraint: Buyer-audience verified before M1 gate deployment

M5.name: infrastructure
M5.description: Platform utilities, registry, data models, static site deployment
M5.constraint: Must support M1–M4 deployment without interruption

M6.name: AI_station_hygiene_to_proof_asset
M6.description: Parked: Investment docs cleaning, hygiene upgrade to proof asset class
M6.constraint: MUST NOT outcompete M1 buyer-proof spend, execution priority, or T0 orchestrator cycles. Resume only after M1 reaches >99% determinism gate.

ai_station_context.reason: M1 buyer-proof is T0 priority; M6 T0 spend capped at zero until M1 constraint satisfied
ai_station_context.resume_condition: M1 gate determinism >99% AND all M2-M5 missions in stable_active status
